subcategory: animated hero section with motion presets
use_cases: Landing page headers with animated text and content reveals
Product or service introduction sections with staggered animations
Portfolio or showcase hero areas with visual impact
Marketing campaign entry points with engaging motion
Application welcome screens with preset animation effects
ai_summary: A versatile hero section component from the Meschacirung design system featuring multiple Framer Motion animation presets including fade, slide, scale, blur, zoom, flip, bounce, rotate, and swing effects. Uses staggered child animations triggered on visibility with configurable container and item variants. Ideal for creating engaging landing page headers with professional motion design.
